source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
<image_1> In the transition-state structure shown in the image, calculate the total number of bonds in the structure, including single, double, and triple bonds but excluding those involving hydrogen.

Note: Disregard arrows. Consider all components present in the transition-state structure shown in the image.
extraction_notes: image_1 is present as a PIL image object string, not a usable path or URL

issues: metadata.extraction_notes state that image_1 was present only as a PIL image object string, not a usable path or URL
metadata.image_paths is empty despite a top-level image path being provided

image_dependency: 题干明确说“shown in the image”，并要求基于图中的 transition-state structure 作答
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明关键信息主要在图像中
需要识别化学结构中的键和组件，纯文本不足以完成计数
multi_step: 需要先识别图中所有组件，再统计所有非氢相关的 single/double/triple bonds
题干要求排除 involving hydrogen 的键，并明确“Disregard arrows”，存在条件过滤
这是视觉识别与规则化计数的组合任务，但不涉及复杂计算或开放推理
verifiability: answer_type 为 numeric，标准答案为单个数值“10”，结果形式清晰
计数规则在题干中给出：包含 single/double/triple bonds，排除 hydrogen，忽略 arrows，便于后续核验
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true，且图像文件 exists=true，有基础核验条件

risk_flags: metadata.extraction_notes state that image_1 was present only as a PIL image object string, not a usable path or URL
metadata.image_paths is empty despite a top-level image path being provided

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像资产都存在，核心语义支撑完整，不满足 reject 条件
该题高度依赖图像，但当前图像文件 exists=true，且题干明确了计数规则，样本仍可直接使用
可验证性较高：答案为单个数值，题干给出了排除 hydrogen 和忽略 arrows 的核验标准
虽有 metadata.image_paths 为空等登记层问题，但属于元数据一致性风险，不构成核心资产缺失
